versions.version_description: Easy to play version using a Capo on the 2nd fret.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Better Love Next Time - Dr. Hook.
#39 on CANADA RPM and #12 on BB Hot 100
on CAPITOL Records in 1979.

[Intro]
[ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]Dbm[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I'm your friend you can talk to me...I read your [/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Gb[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
face, I see miser-y.[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Cause the one you love has left you dry, don't [/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]B[/ch]
start believin' that you're gonna die.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]Gbm[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
Just pick your heart up off the floor and try, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
try again.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                  [ch]Dbm[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
You'll find better love next time, ba---by.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Don't give up and I know you're gonna find..[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
better love next time, baby..someone will be [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
waiting down the line..with better love, better [/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
love, better love, better love next time.[/tab]


[Interlude]
[ch]Dbm[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Dbm[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                   [ch]E[/ch]
Sometimes it's better to let it all go.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
I've been there and I think I should know.[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
So, have a good cry, wash out your heart.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]                              [ch]E[/ch]
If you keep it inside it'll tear you apart.[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]Gbm[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
Sometimes you lose but you're gonna win..[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Gbm[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
if you just, if you just, keep hanging in.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                  [ch]Dbm[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
You'll find better love next time, ba---by.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Don't give up and I know you're gonna find..[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
better love next time, baby..someone will be [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
waiting down the line..with better love, better [/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]             
love...[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]
Better love next time baby.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbm[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
Don't give up and I know you're gonna find..[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]
better love next time baby..[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]
someone will be waiting down the line..with [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]B[/ch]      
better love, better love.[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]
Better love next time baby..[/tab]
(Fade)
